json_data.title: User Experience (UX) Design for Conversational Interfaces
json_data.reason: This topic directly builds on the 'UI Agent' by focusing on how to design intuitive and effective interactions for agents that communicate with users.

json_data.title: Contextual Understanding and Memory in Conversational AI
json_data.reason: Moving beyond simple greetings, this explores how agents maintain coherent and meaningful dialogue by understanding context and remembering past interactions.

json_data.title: Proactive and Adaptive AI Agents
json_data.reason: This advanced research area investigates agents that can anticipate user needs, initiate interactions, and dynamically adjust their behavior without explicit prompts, moving beyond reactive systems.
